itemListElement.reviewBody: Had a worse experience as I went for my son's admission into Jr KG. They took an application fee of 1000 and rejected my son saying that he is very naughty. The principal here is very rude and unprofessional. The staff don't know how to take care of a small child. Avoid this school as the principal and staff's intentions are very bad. Your child will not be safe here.

I am vidya , a student of euroschool. I have been studying in Euroschool for 10years , and it was a wonderful journey. The school has a secure and supportive environment. The administration and faculty are always seeking feedback and striving to implement best practices.I'd say it's been a wholesome experience for me . I can proudly say that the school and teachers have definitely helped me even up in all sectors be it academic, non academics or even over all personality development .
One aspect that truly sets Euro School apart is its supportive community.  This supportive environment has been instru
mental in fostering above for learning and building confidence .

I've been a student at Euro school for the past ,2 years,I am currently studying in 10th B. I have made wonderful memories with all my friends and teachers.For the past 2 years the teachers helped me through my academic and personal growth all the teachers are very friendly and supportive,and encourage me. Beyond academics there is extracurricular activities for the interests of students,it become a second home for me.

I have been studying this school for the past 12 years and have made some of the best memories here. All admin, teaching and house keeping staff were very supportive in all these past years. A safe and secure environment which became my second Home.

I am  Nitya Singhal, a student of Euro school studying in 10th B, i wanted to take a moment and appreciate the school staff and teachers. I've been in the school for around 5 years now and I can proudly say the school and teachers have definately helped me level up in all sectors be it academics, non academics or even over all personality development. I'd say it's been a wholesome experience for me, they have help me gain confidence in matters where it was needed , they have always supported us in every way and encourage us to try new things, it has been a a great opportunity to be in this school

"I've been a student at Euro School for 12 years, and it's been an enriching journey. The school's dedicated staff, excellent teaching quality, and diverse extracurricular activities have played a significant role in shaping my academic and personal growth. The supportive environment fosters a love for learning, and I'm grateful for the countless memories and opportunities this institution has provided me over the years."

"After spending 12 years at Euro School, I can confidently say it has been a transformative experience. The dedicated staff members have not only imparted knowledge but also served as mentors, guiding me through various academic and personal challenges. The teaching quality is exceptional, with educators who are passionate about their subjects and go the extra mile to ensure student success.

Beyond academics, Euro School offers a plethora of extracurricular activities that cater to diverse interests. From sports and cultural events to community service projects, these activities have provided invaluable opportunities for holistic development and personal exploration.

Moreover, the school's facilities are top-notch, providing a conducive environment for learning and growth. The well-equipped classrooms, libraries, laboratories, and recreational spaces contribute to a vibrant campus life.

One aspect that truly sets Euro School apart is its supportive community. Whether it's the teachers, staff, or fellow students, there's always a sense of camaraderie and encouragement. This supportive environment has been instrumental in fostering a love for learning and building confidence.

Overall, my 12-year journey at Euro School has been nothing short of enriching. It has not only equipped me with academic knowledge but also instilled values of resilience, empathy, and curiosity. I'm grateful for the countless memories and lifelong friendships forged within these walls."

I have been studying in this school since 9 years and this is going to be my 10th year (2024)...I just can't express my emotions in words about how the school and I have been together in every trial and stage of my life...it reflected a remarkable journey and I have immense gratitude for their unwavering support..It is a result of their nuturing that made me win so many awards..This esteemed institution not only excels in academics but also focuses on the child's personal growth.....Here teachers are not only teachers,  they guide, they mentor and give individual attention to every student to develop a well-rounded character..They also prepare us for our future endeavors by laying a strong foundation of all the concepts covered in the textbooks and sometimes a little bit beyond...i can't thank the school enough for their amazing love and support...As I embark the next chapter of my life, I wish to carry the values inculcated and the memories cherished over here...

I've been studying at Euro School since Grade 2, right after returning back from Australia. The teachers here made my transition back home smooth and easy. They've not only helped me academically but also supported my personal growth.
At Euro School, I've learned a lot, not just from books but also through fun activities like science lead and community projects like ‘Joy of Giving’ on Rakhi. I look forward for the annual day celebrations that is done every year.
Thank you, Euro School, for eight amazing years of learning and growing.

I have been studying in this school since I was in 1 grade and this school has changed me life in many ways this school has taught me and the experience in this school is wonderful the teachers and all the staff in the school are great and I am very grateful for all the teachers who thought me the school has a lot of events and trips which are very good for the students

As a student who has been attending Euro School Hyderabad for the past year, I am thrilled to share my positive experiences and impressions of this esteemed educational institution.

Nestled in the vibrant city of Hyderabad, Euro School stands as a beacon of academic excellence and holistic development. From the moment I stepped onto its campus, I was greeted by a warm and welcoming atmosphere that instantly made me feel at home.

One of the most notable aspects of Euro School Hyderabad is its commitment to providing a well-rounded education that goes beyond textbooks and classrooms. The school's curriculum is designed to nurture not only academic prowess but also essential life skills, creativity, and character development. Through a diverse range of activities such as sports, arts, music, and community service initiatives, students are encouraged to explore their interests, discover their passions, and develop into well-rounded individuals.

The faculty at Euro School Hyderabad are truly exceptional. Passionate, dedicated, and highly qualified, they serve as mentors and guides, inspiring students to reach their full potential. Their innovative teaching methods, personalized attention, and unwavering support create a conducive learning environment where every student feels valued and empowered to succeed.

Moreover, Euro School Hyderabad boasts top-notch facilities and resources that enrich the learning experience. From well-equipped classrooms to modern laboratories,
